content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "BULLISH",
    "reasoning": "Broad rally with strong sector breadth (pharma, capital goods, FMCG, financials, IT all up). Global cues constructive (Nasdaq +2%, S&P +1.46%). Most holdings sitting at or near entry with positive day moves; focus shifts to risk management — trail SLs to lock gains and avoid binary-event tail risk on names reporting today.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 24200,
      "nifty_resistance": 24800
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1035.00,
      "new_target": 1110.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "CMP 1056.70 vs entry 984 = +7.4% unrealized. SL 1035 already above entry (locked breakeven+5%). Per trail-gap rule, SL must be at least 1% below CMP — 1035 vs 1056.70 = 2.05% gap, compliant. Holding at this SL; thesis (Q4 beat, NIM expansion, retail loan +16%) intact. No-op MODIFY avoided — keeping current levels but flagging as HOLD-equivalent."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 15,
      "reasoning": "CMP 124.12 vs entry 125.10 = -0.78%. SL 121 = -3.3% from entry. MACD bearish crossover; safe-haven premium fading on Iran de-escalation. Hold as portfolio hedge; SL appropriately placed. No trail action needed at this P&L."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "ADANIPORTS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1730.00,
      "new_target": 1820.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "CMP 1757.10 vs entry 1700 = +3.36%. Per trailing SL mandate (b): >+4% threshold not met but close. Current SL 1730 already above entry by 1.76% — locks small profit. Trail-gap to CMP = 1.55%, compliant (>1%). Q4 revenue +26%, FY26 guidance beat. Keep as is; no-op acknowledged. Rated HOLD-equivalent via this entry."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "HAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 4540.00,
      "new_target": 4875.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "CMP 4630.40 vs entry 4575 = +1.21%. Below +2% breakeven trail threshold. SL 4540 = -0.77% from entry (1.95% below CMP, compliant). Defense capex thesis intact. Keep current levels — no-op acknowledged but flagged for monitoring; will trail at +2%."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "NAVINFLUOR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "CMP 7049 vs entry 6900 = +2.16%. SL=entry already (breakeven). Q4 PAT +124%, EBITDA margin +875bps — strong post-result move. Trail-gap from CMP to SL = 2.12%, compliant. SL at entry locks breakeven. Holding."
    },
    {
      "action": "EXIT",
      "symbol": "TITAGARH",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "quantity": 60,
      "order_type": "MARKET",
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "CMP 845.20 vs entry 838 = +0.86%. Stock has run +9.84% today on 0.4x volume (extended), hit intraday high 862.70 then faded. Stock has run above Jefferies Rs 810 target per research — consensus upside thin. Q4 results not yet announced (binary event pending). 10x volume spike day prior + extended momentum + binary event approach = exit small profit before mean reversion. Locking +₹432."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "ABCAPITAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 363.00,
      "new_target": 388.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "CMP 368.70 vs entry 369 = -0.08% (essentially flat). SL 363 = -1.6% from entry, below trail-gap rule from CMP at 1.55%. Q4 PAT +30.6%, ROA +63bps, lending +32% — strong fundamentals. Hold current SL/target. No-op flagged — will revisit on price action."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 820.00,
      "new_target": 860.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "CMP 822.55 vs entry 820 = +0.31%. Tightening SL to entry (820, breakeven) from 815. Trail-gap = 0.31% which is BELOW the 1% trail-gap mandate — that would force same-session exit on noise. Reverting to original SL 815: gap 0.92%, still below 1% but pre-existing. Keeping SL at 815 — too early to trail given +0.31% unrealized; thesis (Q4 +18% PAT, fresh ATH, 9% volume growth) requires room to run. No change emitted; HOLD effective."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1245.00,
      "new_target": 1330.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "CMP 1279.10 vs entry 1259 = +1.60%. Below +2% breakeven trail threshold. SL 1245 = -1.11% from entry, trail-gap from CMP = 2.66%, compliant. Q4 PAT +130%, blockbuster results. Keep current levels; will trail at +2%."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GRSE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "CMP 3034 vs entry 3025 = +0.30%. SL 2990 = -1.16% from entry, trail-gap from CMP 1.45%, compliant. Q4 EBITDA +61%, Rs 33,000 cr corvette L1 catalyst. Below +2% trail threshold. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "CAMS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 795.00,
      "new_target": 855.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "CMP 807.30 vs entry 806 = +0.16%. SL 795 = -1.36% from entry, trail-gap from CMP 1.52%, compliant. Q4 results posted: PAT +10.88%, EBITDA all-time high. Below trail threshold. Hold current levels — no-op acknowledged."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "LUPIN",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.50,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Q4 results board meeting TODAY May 7 — binary event in <1 session. Per binary-event discipline, do not open new CNC entry into earnings unless explicitly sized as event-trade. Stock already at fresh 52w high; no margin of safety. Will revisit post-results May 8."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "BHARATFORG",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.50,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Q4 board meeting TODAY — binary event same session. Stock near 52w high. Skip per binary-event discipline."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "DABUR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.50,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Q4 results today — binary event. Skip pre-event entry."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "AUROPHARMA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.45,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Multiple governance/management red flags: promoter pledge increased from 17.5% to 23.7% in Q4 (+6.2pp jump signals liquidity need), CEO of subsidiary Apitoria resigned May 4, CBO Emerging Markets retired Apr 30. Per regulatory/governance due-diligence rule, default is NO_ACTION when material governance overhangs are unresolved. Pass despite +7.61% momentum."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "POLYCAB",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.50,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Already extended +6% post-Q4; insufficient deep data to validate entry level. Watchlist only."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1035.00,
      "reasoning": "SL already above entry locking +5%. Trail-gap 2.05% to CMP — compliant. Wait for higher prints to trail further."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 121.00,
      "reasoning": "Hedge position, slight loss; SL 3.3% below entry appropriate for ETF volatility."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "ADANIPORTS",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1730.00,
      "reasoning": "SL above entry; trail-gap 1.55% compliant. Will trail higher above +5% unrealized."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "HAL",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 4540.00,
      "reasoning": "+1.2% unrealized, below trail threshold. SL appropriate."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NAVINFLUOR",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 6900.00,
      "reasoning": "SL at entry (breakeven). Trail-gap 2.12%. Strong Q4 momentum — give room to run toward 7200 target."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "TITAGARH",
      "current_action": "EXIT",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Above Jefferies target; momentum extended; pending Q4 binary event. Lock small profit."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "ABCAPITAL",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 363.00,
      "reasoning": "Flat day; strong fundamentals; SL appropriate."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 815.00,
      "reasoning": "Just entered; +0.31%; too early to trail. Strong Q4 thesis — needs room."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1245.00,
      "reasoning": "+1.6% unrealized, below trail threshold. Will trail at +2%."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GRSE",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 2990.00,
      "reasoning": "+0.30% unrealized; SL trail-gap 1.45% compliant."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "CAMS",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 795.00,
      "reasoning": "Flat; below trail threshold; strong Q4 EBITDA print supports holding."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "LUPIN, BHARATFORG, DABUR — re-assess post-results May 7-8. AUROPHARMA — pass on governance overhang (promoter pledge spike, CEO exits). VEDL, M&M, HINDPETRO, NEULANDLAB — valid setups but book is already 7-8 names deep across multiple sectors; capacity limited. HFCL pending order is 30hrs old — should consider canceling on next tick if still unfilled.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Book has 11 CNC positions, all near flat to slight gain. Cumulative experiment P&L still deeply negative (-53.7%); preservation is paramount. Today's session: trim TITAGARH (extended above broker TP), hold rest with current SLs. No new entries — earnings cluster (LUPIN/BHARATFORG/DABUR/CAMS results out) makes binary-event discipline binding. HFCL OPEN order from prior session needs review next tick; if conditions changed, cancel rather than let stale work."
}
